description: Fix two bugs in stackoverflow-api.ts: (1) response.json() called before response.ok check, causing SyntaxError crash on non-JSON 5xx error pages; (2) biome-ignore lint suppression comments that violate project conventions.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/stackoverflow && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Move response.json() call after response.ok check in stackoverflow-api.ts
userStories.description: In plugins/stackoverflow/src/stackoverflow-api.ts, the api() function calls response.json() at line 70 unconditionally, BEFORE checking response.ok at line 81. When the Stack Exchange CDN returns a 502/504 error with an HTML body, response.json() throws a SyntaxError that propagates uncategorized. Move the response.json() call after response.ok is checked, so HTTP errors get classified before JSON parsing.
acceptanceCriteria: In stackoverflow-api.ts, response.json() is only called after confirming response.ok is true
Non-ok responses with non-JSON bodies are handled gracefully (e.g., throw ToolError.internal with the response status)
The existing SE API error_id handling (lines 72-79) still works for SE-format JSON error responses on ok responses

userStories.title: Remove biome-ignore lint suppression comments in stackoverflow plugin
userStories.description: plugins/stackoverflow/src/stackoverflow-api.ts and plugins/stackoverflow/src/tools/schemas.ts contain biome-ignore lint comments suppressing noExplicitAny, which violates the project's convention (CLAUDE.md: 'NEVER use biome-ignore comments'). Replace the any types with unknown and add proper type-narrowing in the mapper functions.
acceptanceCriteria: No biome-ignore comments remain in stackoverflow-api.ts or tools/schemas.ts
The SEResponse.items type uses unknown (or a properly typed interface) instead of Record<string, any>[]
The biome lint rule for noExplicitAny passes without suppression
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/stackoverflow/src/stackoverflow-api.ts (SEResponse interface, line ~93)
- plugins/stackoverflow/src/tools/schemas.ts (RawData type, line ~91)

Context:
The SEResponse interface has:
  // biome-ignore lint/suspicious/noExplicitAny: SE API returns untyped JSON
  items: Record<string, any>[];

And schemas.ts has a similar RawData type using any.

Changes:
1. Change `Record<string, any>[]` to `Record<string, unknown>[]` in SEResponse.items
2. In schemas.ts, change RawData from `Record<string, any>` to `Record<string, unknown>`
3. Update any code that accesses items properties to use type assertions (e.g., `item.title as string` or optional chaining with type narrowing)
4. Remove the biome-ignore comments

Constraints:
- Do NOT change the API call logic
- The mapper functions in tool files may need to add explicit type assertions when accessing item fields — that is acceptable and correct
- Do NOT add type assertions using 'as any' (that would just move the any elsewhere)
